title: Trump-Xi summit May 14-15 in Beijing — unfinished Iran war gives Xi upper hand; Araghchi visit timed before summit
snippet: Trump-Xi summit scheduled May 14-15 in Beijing. Originally planned for March but delayed by Iran war. Iran/Hormuz, Taiwan, trade all on agenda. CNN analysis: unfinished war strengthens Xi's negotiating position. US wants China to press Iran on ceasefire. Beijing presses Washington on Taiwan. Araghchi's Beijing visit (5/5-6) strategically positions China as power broker one week before summit.
tag_reason: Trump-Xi 정상회담과 이란 전쟁 연결 분석은 신규. 5/14-15 일정 확인.
